name: Smart Sunset Lamp
description: Warm amber projection lamp with remote control. USB powered. Multiple color modes. Casts a golden arc across your wall — the kind of light that makes everything feel intentional.

name: Quiet Desk Fan
description: 3-in-1 fan, humidifier, and cooler. Multiple speeds. Water tank for mist cooling. Silent enough to forget it's there — until you notice the air feels different.

name: 75% Mechanical Keyboard
description: Ajazz AK820 Pro. Gasket mount. Hot-swappable. Pre-lubed linear switches. PBT keycaps. Rotary knob. Wired, Bluetooth, and 2.4G wireless. The sound of focus.

name: Oversized Felt Desk Mat
description: Premium wool felt. Non-slip rubber base. 900x400mm. Heat resistant. Dark grey. The surface everything else sits on — chosen, not defaulted to.

name: Wood Grain Aroma Diffuser
description: 300ml ultrasonic diffuser. Remote control. Dark wood grain. Ambient LED glow. USB powered. Mist that turns your desk into a ritual.

name: USB Mug Warmer
description: Black ceramic heating plate. USB powered. Silent operation. Black cable. The kind of detail that turns a desk into a room that takes care of you.

name: Monitor Light Bar
description: Aluminum body. 44cm. Touch control. Five color temperatures. USB powered. Asymmetric light that illuminates your desk without touching your screen.
